nativePolicy: Badge is always a noninteractive span and rejects every React event handler plus href, accessKey, editable/drag state, focus, role, dangerous HTML, and generic accessible-name overrides at type and runtime boundaries.
Category, status, and count modes are explicit; status punctuation and severity/label order use the stable badge.status formatter key and never truncate long labels.
Count mode caps only its visual value and exposes a localized exact accessible count.
Interactive affordances wrap Badge in a correctly named Button or Link rather than changing Badge semantics.
The default category mode emits neither localized severity nor hidden exact-count output; status and count enhancements are explicit discriminated modes.
